project.name: jaiclaw
project.description:
JaiClaw is a Java 21 / Spring Boot framework for building multi-channel AI agents. It connects LLMs to messaging platforms
  (Telegram, Slack, Discord, Teams, SMS, email) with tool execution, MCP hosting, multi-tenancy, plugin extensibility, and a
  Spring Shell CLI. Embeddable as a library or deployable as a standalone gateway.
